name: Berry Lemon Cake
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Fat-free sour cream, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Prepare a 12-cup Bundt pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the cake mix and baking powder; set aside.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine blueberries, sour cream, egg whites, oil, and lemon peel. Mix dry ingredients with wet ingredients just until moistened.
5. Pour batter into prepared pan.
6. Bake for 40 minutes.
Serving Ideas: Serve warm or cool with powdered sugar or whipped cream.
